Worth knowing...


Hiya! ^-^  This isn’t one of those first post ‘Friends Only’ entries you often see, but rather some important info about this blog in case you skipped my profile bio =3.

-    I’m an open person online – my blog is readable to anyone and I do not use filters
-    I try to tag all my entries accordingly
-    If you're sensitive to certain topics, judge entries based on their tags or Userpic before proceeding
-    This blog contains ageplay/ABDL and furry/babyfur content ~ if this is too much information then don't read it
-    Names are replaced with pseudonyms or usernames ~ if you’d like yours removed from an entry just let me know
-    I tend not to friend or friend back people I’ve never met or gotten to know ~ don't hesitate to PM me, it's totally cool! :D

Thanks for reading thus far and I hope you enjoy (or find interesting) whatever else beyond this!  =P
♫ Mickey Factz - Sunrise

Fail blog...

Aug. 21st, 2011   4:59 PM
I tried writing an entry today but I was only able to get so far before being disappointed with LiveJournal.  The layout of my entry was being double spaced for whatever reason and I had no control over adjust the size of pictures.  I'm not happy ~ I haven't written in a while and when I find the time to do so this website acts up.  I'm going to use LJBook to back everything up and then find a new blogging website.  Until then I probably won't be posting with the exception for 'Do More Mondays'. 

Thanks for stopping by, take care! :)
😑 blah  |  ♫ Jay Z & Kanye West - Murder To Excellence
Link

Aug. 21, 2011

Aug. 21st, 2011   11:34 AM
Looks like another month with minimal blog entries ~ my bad.  Let's work backwords on this recap...

======================================

Today

Since last Tuesday and until the end of the month I've been housesitting for a really good friend ~ it'll be the longest I've lived on my own.  It isn't a big deal to most people I know because they're far more independent, but for someone whose always lived with their family it's quite a refreshing change!  While at the same time it takes a lot of trust and responsibility, which I'm thankful to have and live up to.  I love living downtown with a humble balcony view, being a social hub where people can hang out, and having the freedom to do or wear what I want in a less private manner.  It's an experience I'll work towards getting :)

======================================
TuesdayJack Layton's passing gives me the shivers followed by great sadness ~ he was leader of the New Democratic Party.

===============================


Yesterday

I went to Wonderland with Stage Lion, Mith, Kyne Wolf, Ein, Fretts for most of the day ~ it was incredibly fun! \o.o/  Behemoth is still my most favourite roller coaster despite losing $5 in pocket change and the watch face of my SlapWatch :(

  

In the evening I went to the monthly ABDL/ageplay munch.  At first I didn't think I would make it but I'm really glad I did, it was a really relaxing way to wind down.  There were ten people in total with some old and new faces ~ I'm
Link

'Toronto ABDL/Ageplay Group' Monthly Munch! - August 20th

Aug. 14th, 2011   11:02 AM
NEWS!  I got the munch listed among other like minded folks on LittlesMunch.com ~ big thanks to spacey, who makes up one half of the ever so awesome 'Big Little Podcast'.  A forwarding email address for the munch was also created - TorontoMunch@littlesmunch.com - so that's pretty spiffy and legitimate looking! :D  I'll be tinkering with the event details later to make it look a bit cleaner.

Also, I won't be attending this months munch :(  But Boyricky and will be there if you need a familiar face to look for! :3

===================================

(cross-post)

In and around Toronto there are a lot more ABDLs, ageplayers and babyfurs than you might think!  Wouldn’t it be fun and exciting to hangout with like minded people ~ make some new friends or see familiar ones?  Come join us in a safe and friendly environment over dinner!  (Please note there has been a change in location!)

WHEN:    The munches take place every 3rd Saturday of each month.  The next munch date is: August 20th

TIME:    Munches take place at 7pm until whenever.

WHERE:    Spirits Bar & Grill, located at 642 Church Street, just south of Bloor.

WEBSITE:   http://www.spiritsbarandgrill.com/

DIRECTIONS:    The best way to Spirits would be to take the TTC subway to Bloor-Yonge station, walk one block east to Church St. and then a few steps south.

For those who are driving, have a look on Google Maps

If you need specific directions from a particular location, please email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com

PARKING:   There is street parking with Green P meters along Church and Hayden St ~ rates are around $2/half hr.

HOW TO FIND US:   The munch organizer looks like this ~ short, Asian and wears a spunky hat.  Our table is usually at the back, in the raised level area, near the projector screen. 

The munch organizer will generally be there a few minutes early to request a group of tables be set aside as seating is on a first-come, first-served basis.  That being said, it is important to be at the restaurant as close to 7pm as possible to ensure that the group is seated together.  Those who come later might not be seated at the group table, depending on how busy the restaurant is ~ you might be able to request a table near ours as an alternative.

IMPORTANT NOTE:    This is a *public place* so due discretion is warranted. (i.e. don't come wearing obvious diapers, bondage gear, etc. and don't make a scene. :-)

The munches are NOT a "pickup event" and are NON-SEXUAL in nature. This goes for the munch itself and anywhere the group may go afterwards. It's not a night for "getting some" :-)

CONTACT INFO:   Have more questions? Feel free to email me: TorontoMunch@littlesmunch.com



See you there!
😄 cheerful  |  ♫ Drake (ft. Jay-Z) - Light Up
Link

Rant...

Aug. 10th, 2011   11:19 PM
In order to be successful, one must project an image of success at all times. (cathartic)

It brings me no pleasure to admit that right now I don't care about anyone besides myself. 

  • I don't give a shit about your problems when I have some of my own...but I'll grit my teeth and listen because we're friends.  
For someone who brags a lot, you sure do fall pretty hard when things start to suck.  I don't give a shit about your problems though, especially when I have some of my own.    ...but I'll grit my teeth and listen because we're friends.  I know you'd do the same for me but I'm not as open as you are. 

You brag a lot and it's rather annoying, so when you fall I find some amusement in it.  Unfortunately I don't give a shit about your problems when I have some of my own. 

I don't enjoy using MSN anymore.  Some people have just ruined it for me  I have a lot of meaningless conversations with people I don't care about.    There are a lot of people I just want to block but it would be painfully obvious and it'd look bad on our 'friendship'. 

I don't understand myself sometimes and it's fustrating.

I don't give a shit about your problems when I have some of my own...but I'll listen to you rant because we're friends.

I don't give a shit about your problems when I have some of my own...but I'll listen to them even if it makes  because we're friends

I find it hard to give a damn about ole's problems when you have some of your own.

The feeling of insignificance

it's nothing new and I don't do anything about it.

I don't understand myself sometimes and it's fustrating.  I have wonderful friends, I know how to have a good time, and I try to do right by giving back

I don't understand myself sometimes and it's fustrating.  I can have the

...I have wonderful friends.  I know how to have a good time.  I try to do right by giving back. 

My self-esteem has been

I don't understand myself sometimes.  I have wonderful friends and I know how to have a good time, but my thoughts wander

i find it fustrating

Everybody needs somebody to love...

Thanks for the good times!

Aug. 2nd, 2011   11:28 PM
Last month I only wrote 6 entries ~ not including 4 for 'Do More Mondays' and 1 for an event advertisement.  As much as I enjoy blogging I'm pretty okay with the lack of it lately.  It's summer and I've been out enjoying it whenever I can!  I know that if I were to write an entry for each of my outtings it'd make certain people envious.  It's happened a few times and it's not cool when people project.  I'm not out to make people feel bad and it's unfortunate I can't share the fun times with everybody ~ most of the time it's just sporadic planning. 

I have the worst memory but Twitter made it easy to recall what I've been up to.  Thank you to everyone who made July awesome ~ there's a lot more to come I'm sure! 

June 30-July 2 - Canada Day in Guelph
July 3 - Pride Parade with local ABDLs
July 5 - Dinner at Spirits with local ABDLs
July 6 - Monthly furry munch
July 9 - Flow's mini putt furmeet
July 14 - After work fun with local ABDLs
July 16 - Monthly ABDL munch + movie
July 17 - Cars 2 with Twicks and MimiBadger
July 19 - Dinner at Boyricky and friends
July 20 - Summerlicious dinner at Watusi
July 22-24 - Condition: Red
July 29 - Dinner with diprguytoronto
July 30 - Playing outside with Greenbean
July 31 - Day trip to Ottawa
Aug 1 - Hanging out with Stevied75

It is what it is...

Jul. 28th, 2011   10:05 PM
I’m kinda glad LiveJournal has been spazzing this week or else I’d have posted something really emo that I wrote to myself the other day and would regret it.  My self-esteem has been really loopy lately causing me to be rather anti-social.  I would look at certain people and think they’re better than me - I’d know it - and the feeling sucked.  I’m pretty messed up at times but I’m on my way to bouncing back!  It’s like what I mentioned last month; I go between these high and low moments so regularly it's become pretty stupid...that's just me I guess =\.

Last nights ABDL munch...videos...

Jul. 17th, 2011   3:07 PM
Just a quick post along with some videos to share!  I received some questions from my last post and I will be getting around to answering them when I find the time to sit still!  Keep'em coming and I'll feed your curiosity ~ feel free to comment anonymously or sending me an email ^^. 

Yesterday afternoon was a bit of a bummer because Ms. Seven's littles' play date got postponed till next weekend when I won't be in town.  But I managed to find something fun to do with Stevied75 and a couple other ABDL friends :D.  We mostly just avoided the heat outside, played boardgames, listened to music and drank until the monthly ageplay munch.  Even though there were only eight of us - as oppose to the dozen or so from previous months - I'm quite content with it because many were friends I've known for a few years.  What's more, making friends and introducing them to new ones is always a win-win!  Our new restaurant location is also pretty awesome :3

I knew there wouldn't be an afterparty because certain people couldn't make it to the munch, so I had arranged for most of us to go see the latest Harry Potter movie.  Other than shamelessly nodded off a few times, constantly hearing someone in the audience add their own commentary, and the lame ending, I thought the movie was all right.  I might need to rewatch for a more perkier opinion XD.  I didn't get home until around 2am because some of us lounged at Stevied75's place afterwards ~ good times!

==============================

Riley Kilo did a segment on TLC's "My Strange Addiction"


I'm curious to watch this episode.  I've followed her blog for a long time and I think she's very charming, but the show in general kinda gives me the heebie-jeebies.  It's interesting how recently another ABDL (Stanley) also shared his personal life on tv.

An interesting video promoting "Asiansploitation: All Grown Up" a sketch comedy show for the Toronto Fringe Festival
🐇 bouncy  |  ♫ Drake - November 18th

About being an ABDL...?

Jul. 13th, 2011   8:42 PM
Lately I’ve been asked by some of my readers to write more about being an adult baby/diaper lover (ABDL) ~ which brought to my attention that I don’t write about it nearly as much as I use to.  I’ve never been approached with such a request so it was rather flattering to know I have curious readers! :P

The only problem is I don’t know where to begin.  Whenever I blog I don’t really know who reads it except for those I’ve come to expect ~ particularly people who know me personally.  I think new readers have a harder time knowing who I am by reading my latest entries since I don’t focus on just ABDL content.

Let me know what you’d like me to write about by either commenting anonymously or sending me an email :)
🌀 silly  |  ♫ Meaghan Smith - A Little Love

What does it mean, Being ABDL and me

Jul. 13th, 2011   8:09 PM
I don`t roleplay because there is something very figment about it. ======= It is never my intent to make other people envy when in fact I get envious of other people.  It seems like I know many people below the standards of living.   I want to be a big name...despite people already knowing about me.  I want to be known by everyone.  But I don't do enough to warrent it... ======= Write ways to feel like a little boy - roll pants - chew gum - chew straw - pressing buttons, handicap, elevator - mix fountain drinks - swing legs (bless my shortness) - apparel and accessories, (socs, undies, pokewalker, keys, blet, bag, hats, shoes) - night light - say what you feel and make people happy or amused - be silly - make a game out of things, race, etc - don't be so serious - sense of wonder and curiosity - thumb to mouth - daydreaming - harrasing birds and squirrels I don't believe in 'online' families...ageplay there are obvious things (plushies, diapers)...and subtle things ===== http://babyfur.livejournal.com/901566.html http://babyfur.livejournal.com/922222.html

I'm an idiot

Jul. 11th, 2011   10:28 PM
I feel a lot of shame admitting that I am rather ignorant about foreign affairs because I rarely follow international news.  The information is readily available to me but I choose not to give it much mind because it is largely political or tragic.  At times, I am guilty of allowing myself to believe that global issues aren't things which I can be affected by or I can affect.  But when I digest these beliefs I know that it isn't true.  Another person's suffering - even halfway around the world - does affect me because I have a heart and I feel for them.  What's more, I can affect these issues by making a difference.  Who ever said "A single death is a tragedy; a million deaths is a statistic" is illogical.  A million deaths is a million tragedies. 

I've been reading a lot about the current drought in Somalia; the head of the United Nations called it "the worst humanitarian disaster" in the world.  Hundreds of thousands of people have been displaced because their nomadic region is no longer sustainable.  There are refugee camps along the borders of Ethiopia and Kenya, but the capacity to pride aid is severely lacking.  Some don't even make the weeks long walk to these shelters.  Water is scarce, livestock carcasses are scattered on roads, disease and malnutrition is raising ~ innocent people are starving to death.  One international doctor said. "We can treat the severely malnourished children, but they will definitely come back to us underfed because there is not enough food." 

Highest Rated Comments
http://www.cbc.ca/news/world/story/2011/07/10/somalia-drought-famine-un-humanitarian.html
http://africandt.org/somalia-drought-crisis-2011/
Link

Putt putt, pics and vids!

Jul. 10th, 2011   8:02 PM
Yesterday Flow organized a mini putt furmeet ~ it was sweaty good fun! :D  There were 30 furries and 18 of which were fursuiters!  I'm kinda bummed that I didn't make much of an effort to meet some new people other than in passing, but c'est la vie maybe next time ^^;;  I had no idea there was a golf course, driving range and mini putt in the middle of the city, and even though the venue itself was just okay, there were a lot of people.

  
(Red Velvet, Osskar, Tauntaun, Amico, and I donno who the black dragon is)
I took a few pics, but only this one looks good heh ~ snapping shots in suit is pretty tricky!)  When other people's pics start circulating I'll post them here =3. 


RK Niner took these pics and put together this video ^^.

========================================================

I also found this pic of Finnigan and I from last months fundraiser on the Windsor/Essex Human Society gallery :D
  
========================================================

Lastly, I wanted to share this video Dodge made for me.  It was incredibly sweet of him and completely unnecessary, but all the same I feel lucky to have a friend in him through thick and thin! =3


(I cringe each time I see the sleeve come open to reveal a gap in my fursuit >>**  Just that little bit completely ruins it for me ~ I really need to find a fix for it!)

It's been a while...threesome!

Jul. 7th, 2011   1:58 PM
June 28
After work I met up with Jerroh.  After wetting a baby diaper (that swelled like crazy) and jerking myself off, I let him finger me.  He injected my butt with lube.  He tried fucking me with a condom on, but couldn't satisfy.  I let him bareback me.  It only felt a litle bit different, but I bled after sitting on the toilet later.  There was also blood in my stool the next two or three days.  I don't know if I should've been concerned...but it's probably cause I hadn't had sex in a month.  I took him out for drinks and food ~ changed out afterwards and went home in just a Goodnite.

July 3
I went to the Pride parade with Mario and Michael.  Later in the evening back at his place we all got it on...my first really physical threesome?  Perhaps.  They rimmed me, gave me blowjobs, fingered me, kissed, nibbled, and tongued me...Mike even tried putting his dick in me, but couldn't get it hard enough to satisfy.  Instead, they stuck a big dildo in me and then diapered me up.  They both pissed down my diaper at one point.  It was all incredibly hot!

After dinner (bib and paci on the balcony) and some drinks (mine in a sippy cup which they nursed for me), Mario left and I had some alone cuddle time with Michael.  He dry humped me a bit.  He's in the processes of making SPH for diapers! 

July 5
After having dinner at Spirits, I went to Stevie's place, picking up some beer along the way.  Sheldon was there was well and we lounged around with some weed.  We eventually made our way to the bedroom (Sheldon carried me there!) and he Sheldon changed me, then I changed Stevie.  And we put Sheldon in a diaper...very hot.  We jerked each other off, kissed, tongued, rubbed.  No sex though.  I jerked myself off to come.  Then I pissed down Stevie's diaper and put my 'unused but worn' diaper on him.

Sporadic planning...smart!

Jul. 5th, 2011   12:18 AM
Last Thursday morning I left for work with the intent of not coming home for part of the long weekend.  So I packed my bag with an idea of where I wanted to go and a bit of wishful thinking =P. 

I'm sure it took some good luck to nest a plan while texting at work hehe.  I went to Guelph until Saturday morning and stayed with , and .  Thanks for having me; tasty alcohol amplifies the awesome! ^-^  While there we had dinner with .  Along with some crinkly time, he generously gave me a handful of vintage Attends! O3O  Thanks a bunch!  On Friday I got to meet but not get to know Cyrakhis, Patto and Skorp ~ I'm pretty okay with that.  We had dinner in Oakville and watched the Canada Day fireworks in Burlington by the waterfront.  It was a really relaxing trip, bus ride and all.
 
1)   2)   3)   4)
1) Neouka's new Ford Focus...it's super sophisticated!  2) HOMG PLUSHIES! <3 Stage and Mith were getting rid of them so I took home two  3)4) Talk about an amazingly huge fireworks display

On Sunday I watched the Toronto Pride Parade, having not decided who to go with just days leading up to it ^^;;.  I went with two local ABDLs and had a fun time ~ diapers, cocktails, and blunts before, during, and after the festivities! \o.o/  I've seen the parade a number of times so there's nothing really new to go on about, and the crowd along Church St. is always quite the experience.  We went to Zippers afterwards hoping to catch Miss Conception but she wasn't on until later.  The rest of the night I was quite pampered by my friends over dinner and some comfy cuddles =3.

     

Tonight I made hasty dinner plans for tomorrow ~ I'm scoping out a new location for the monthly Ageplay/ABDL munch since he old place packed up and left without notice.  It's easy to call out people for a good time, but whether they can make it or not due to prior commitments can be a bummer to find out ^^;; 

I still need to make concrete plans for Condition: Red, Summerlicious, Diaper Camp, and whatever else I've forgotten!
🐇 bouncy  |  ♫ Classified - Cheap Talk
Link

It wasn't AC...but it was still fun!

Jun. 29th, 2011   8:43 PM
Earlier in the month I mentioned going to Windsor this past weekend ~ it was awesome and definitely the distraction I needed from thinking about what I was missing at Anthrocon ^^;;

The four hour drive down with Shaylaskye on Friday was a bit dreadful because of some traffic and me being cranky from working in the morning.  I was in good company though and we had some fun laughs.  The muffler on her beater car punctured along the way making it sound like an obnoxious jackass, so we named her Bertha! XD  We got to Windsor in the evening and hit up an LCBO before going to Finnigan's place.  I got to meet a bunch of local furs that came over ~ gonna have trouble remembering them all but they were totally chill! :D  HOMG!  I got introduced to DotWar and how to get cheap nacho cheese by abusing the dispenser at 7 Eleven.  Sadly I'll be sick of melty cheese for a while because of that. XP

After a really late night, I woke up Saturday morning feeling squiggly but braved through it to go fursuiting with Finni.  The event we volunteer for was at a golf centre with proceeds going to the Windsor/Essex Humane Society.  I didn't know what to expect and it was definitely a stretch from what I imagined but I enjoyed it.  There were a number of food and craft vendors, some makeshift games and face painting for the kids, a couple of farm animals, a driving range and mini putt (which we got to play in suit).  The people were very humble as well! =3

                                            

Sadly I only got one pic of us in suit while we were taking a break in the back because no furiends were with us :<  Oh wells, we had a good looking volunteer spotting for us who did a really great job keeping the kids at bay and drawing the shy ones out.  There were a pair of girls that kept following us which got a bit exhausting to entertain and of course some people misclassified our species/gender, but other than that we made a lot of people smile which makes me happy! ^^  

Shayla and her boyfriend Dastiger picked us up afterwards and we lounged around briefly while deciding what to do next.  The choices were rather limiting because it's Windsor >>"  Eventually we made our way to the waterfront and fed bread to the birds ~ it was really relaxing especially with the sunset.  At one point during our stroll there were fireworks going off infront and behind us for the Windsor-Detroit Freedom Festival, but they were out of sight unfortunately.  There were fireflies though! D:  I've never seen any in my life up until then.  We headed back to Finni's place after some shenanigans with the sculptures along the path.

  
  

The night would've ended perfectly cause we had pizza, booze, a couple episodes of Power Rangers, and the first Ninja Turtles movie...but a swarm of flying freakin' ants found there way in!  It was pretty fucked up and prompted us to go out and buy bug repellent.  I can't recall what the time was but it was pretty late, so we huddled into Finni's bedroom, popped in the first Ghostbusters movie, and called it a night.  Long day was long! OSO  The next morning I headed home by train fairly exhausted, but the weekend was definitely good times =3.
🐇 bouncy  |  ♫ Death From Above 1979 - Going Steady
Link

Blah...

Jun. 22nd, 2011   11:30 PM
Since the end of the weekend I've been feeling really out of it ~ angst and anti-social.  I go between these high and low moments so regularly it's becoming stupid.  I got really bogged down after what felt like being severely outclassed by two other people at a recent party.  There was a man there who I had feelings for but whether they were mutual was questionable because it felt like I was competing for his attention.  It put into perspective what I was not and what I was doing wrong.  Today I had hoped to meet with another man who I've had a curious interest in.  However, from past encounters I did not have high expectations that things would come through.  I had hoped that things would be different but instead he left me hanging and disappointed.  I don't want to read too deeply into things but it seems as though I depend on other people to make me happy.  It isn't the right approach and I need to bounce from this funk.
😑 blah  |  ♫ Mickey Factz - Letter to Sonic

This past week...

Jun. 19th, 2011   8:40 PM
(continuing from last post)

Monday - injured my toe

Wednesday - took the day off, watched Game 7 with Boyricky

Taking the good with the bad...

Jun. 13th, 2011   11:44 PM
Been trying my best to avoid FA as much as possible...kinda bummed about all the cons I'm missing out on, while in the back of my mind I've got that whole "been there, done that" attitude >>*  Quite conflicting but the former definitely gets me down :<

So I just make the most with what I got locally!  There was a freakin' fun fair behind my house on Saturday! 
  
Didn't do anything but watch cause I'm too big and too cheap o___O"  I spent a few hours in the afternoon with a local daddy and we just hopped from place to place and got coffee.  It was a good distraction from a fursuit event downtown I skipped on ^^;;

On Sunday I climbed trees with Blondboy!
  
Way fun but I couldn't get as high as he did because I fear heights in these sorta situations =P.  We wandered midtown - hitting up a toys store, a gelato place, and a sushi restaurant.  Hung out at night at his place with K-Dawg watching 'Finding Nemo' =3

And then to end the good vibes I smooshed my big toe at work today ~ accidentally dropped a skid of paper on it.  It's a bit discoloured and there's a constant pain partly due to the swelling.  Plus I can't walk properly, so I donno what'll happen with work tomorrow :V

'Toronto ABDL/Ageplay Group' Monthly Munch! - June 18th

Jun. 7th, 2011   10:06 PM

(cross-post)

In and around Toronto there are a lot more ABDLs, ageplayers and babyfurs than you might think!  Wouldn’t it be fun and exciting to hangout with like minded people ~ make some new friends or see familiar ones?  Come join us in a safe and friendly environment over dinner!

 

 

WHEN:    The munches take place every 3rd Saturday of each month.  The next munch date is: June 18th

TIME:    Munches take place at 7pm until whenever.

WHERE:    The Gov’nor Pub, located at 401 Bloor Street East, just west of Sherbourne subway station.

WEBSITE:   http://www.govnorpub.com/

DIRECTIONS:    The best way to The Gov’nor Pub would be to take the subway to Sherbourne subway station on the Bloor-Danforth line, and walk from there.

If you need public transit information, check out http://www.ttc.ca, http://www.gotransit.ca, or http://www.viarail.ca.

For those who are driving, have a look on Google Maps: Click here!

If you need specific directions from a particular location, please email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com

PARKING:   There is a public parking lot directly behind The Gov’nor Pub (enter off of Selby Street) and costs $6.  The parking ticket machine takes Toonies (Canadian $2 coin) only so be sure to bring three of them along.

HOW TO FIND US:   The munch organizer looks like this ~ short, Asian and wears a spunky hat.  Our table is usually at the back, in the raised level area, near the projector screen. 

The munch organizer will generally be there a few minutes early to request a group of tables be set aside as seating is on a first-come, first-served basis.  That being said, it is important to be at the restaurant as close to 7pm as possible to ensure that the group is seated together.  Those who come later might not be seated at the group table, depending on how busy the restaurant is ~ you might be able to request a table near ours as an alternative.

IMPORTANT NOTE:    This is a *public place* so due discretion is warranted. (i.e. don't come wearing obvious diapers, bondage gear, etc. and don't make a scene. :-)

The munches are NOT a "pickup event" and are NON-SEXUAL in nature. This goes for the munch itself and anywhere the group may go afterwards. It's not a night for "getting some" :-)

CONTACT INFO:   Have more questions? Feel free to email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com


See you there!

~dumpling

😄 cheerful  |  ♫ D-Pryde – Outro Flow
Link

Jun. 6, 2011

Jun. 6th, 2011   7:01 AM
It bothers me that I find it difficult to be open about my problems when talking to the friends I trust.  I feel as though I'm not reciprocating as a friend should by seeking advice.  Part of this is because I think my issues are unrelatable, awkward or condescending.  It seems as though the only way people know what's on my mind is by reading my blog.  But I don't share everything ~ I keep private entries of how I feel or what I've done.  If there's one thing I don't make public is that I don't kiss and blog.  I've gotten intimate with a different person each week for the past three.  Before then it would sometimes be once or twice a month. 
Link

Jun. 5th, 2011   10:36 PM
On Friday (3rd) I hung out with Daddy Nelson ~ we'd gotten together for coffee on Monday (May 30) but that was a short meet.  This time we watched X-Men: First Class and ate sushi for dinner.  Afterwards he invited me back to his place for cuddling.  I'm not too sure how much I enjoyed it when I think about it now.  I'm sure I sorta enjoyed it at the moment, but not so much now.  We cuddled in front of the tv.  I rubbed his back and he did mine ~ he took off his shirt.  I eventually took off my pants and sat in a soggy diaper.  We felt each other up, but he didn't go for my diaper at all.  I'm not too happy about that.   Eventually he got to fingering me ~ he was at it for quite a while and I was kinda hard but not entirely while he jerked me off.  He'd occasionally tickle my asshole.  I eventually took the wheel and came.   I'm not too sure whether or not I want to do that again.  I'm not necessarily into him ~ he's too amature at this, has kids and a boy friend.  So it's awkward.  Plus it looks like he's always thinking methodically rather than nurturingly.  I make myself too easy and I rush things to becoming sexual.  I tried not to make it that way but it still happened.  There's something wrong with me.

Progress is a slow process...

May. 30th, 2011   1:38 AM
A lot of the time I feel as though my social life is restricted by my parents and living at home.  They know nearly none of my friends because I don't talk about them - they're either from the furry or ageplay community - and I prefer to keep it that way.  So there is a real stress on trust for them to not know what I'm doing whenever I go out.  Lying to them is also a burden.  It annoys me having to deal with my father's assumptions and suspicions when I come home, or having to plan my activities so that it's doesn't spill his tolerance.  I am capable of doing so many fun things.  When I move out, I think, I'll be having the best times of my life but sadly I'm not financially ready for that. 

In conjunction to this uneasy feeling of wanting to maintain an active lifestyle, my attention span towards sitting in front of the computer has grown thin.  I don't use FurAffinity, RUPadded, or the various other social networking sites and forums as much as I use to.  I'm more connected to quick and mobile web applications like Twitter, MSN and Foursquare.  I'm not as interested in people from the internet than I am with those I've met or are local to me.  Despite doing it for years but no longer, I've gradually become annoyed at roleplayers because I feel better than them.  I've either experienced enough things or that they are attainable to me that I no longer need to fantasize about them. 

This might just be a passing summer phase, but I want to read more books, play more sports, meet people, travel, fursuit, party...actualize my potentials!
😑 blah  |  ♫ Ben Folds Five - Just Pretend

Days gone by...

May. 23rd, 2011   7:50 PM
I really appreciate the comments in reply to my last entry ~ thank you.  I have those thoughts from time to time but I keep them to myself since it's no one's business but my own.  When other things stress me out though my handle on personal issues loosen and it just affects me as a whole.  Not the first or last time it'll happen.  Can't say whether I'll do anything about it right now since it feels right to just let that part of my life take its own course. 

=======================================

Happy Victoria Day to my fellow Canadians!  Personally I don't think it's anything too significant worth celebrating but I ain't complaining when there's no work and I get to play with fireworks! :D  Despite having a stressful time at work last week I managed to have some fun and do some shopping! 

On Monday I took advantage of a sale from my favourite online clothing store, Threadless, and bought ten new tees for the summer!  Check it ~ you'll have to look'em up on your own though!  I now own 24 tees from them and totally loving it XD.

On Tuesday Twicks came down from Guelph to visit MimiBadger, so Stagelion and I tagged along =3.  More the merrier, right?  We had dinner at East Side Marios and acted like kids ~ naturally =P.  It was a good thing they put us in the back! 

On Friday after work I impuslively got a new phone and extended my contract with Telus for another three years. I've done enough research but just couldn't wait for the Samsung Galaxy S2 to come out in July.  (I still want it D:)  I got the HTC Desire HD; still getting use to how huge it is and the Android OS, but I'm liking it a lot!  My plan includes 6gb of data and I've already used 250mb o__O.  The one thing that really sucked was when I transferred contacts and SMS history from the old to new phone.  For whatever reason it automatically resent hundreds of messages to people.  I feel so bad about that ~ it's a known issue that hasn't been resolved...they should be embarrassed. 

Later in the evening I went out for drinks with Dodge and his wifey.  It was a really nice way to transition into the weekend and enjoy the weather =3. 

On Saturday and Sunday I went to Guelph and stayed with Stagelion and Neouka.  Rapture Day was disappointing >>".  But barbecuing burgers isn't! :D  Aside from eating lots, we loafed around in front of the tube most of the time ~ it was really relaxing ^-^.  I drank a lot too, but did it spread out enough to only get a bit tipsy.  For a couple of hours a fur from Burlington came to visit too; it was great meeting hew people.  Plus I was crinkly all weekend and that's always awesome! XD

(I think I lost my keys in Guelph .____."  My house key is easy to replace but I lost my good Swiss Army knife, irreplaceable condo gym keys, and two robot key caps T___T.  I have a feeling my WarAmp key tags will arrive in the mail tomorrow...so that'd be a kick to the balls)

Today I opted not to attend the annual Centre Island BBQ furmeet just cause I wasn't feeling up to it and neither was the weather.  I had fun last year despite not knowing a lot of people, probably would've had even more fun had I gone today.  Oh well, I hadn't had much time to myself so I took care of some chores for most of the day ^^;;  In the afternoon, for the first time in like eight months, I went jogging outside.  I did 6km in 44 minutes ~ which is below the average of seven minutes per kilometer.  I was hoping I'd do better considering I walk an average of 18,000 steps a day at work and the jog was only 6500 steps.  Definitely gonna work on that this summer! >:3
😴 tired  |  ♫ Chris Faust (ft. Cocoa Sarai) - Black Clouds
Link

Time heals what reasons cannot...

May. 20th, 2011   12:07 AM
Lately I've been struggling with thoughts about being single and alone.  This isn't the first time as it's something constantly on the back of my mind, but recently it's been stressing me out.  I have trouble sleeping, I'm often moody or anti-social, my stomach feels pitted and throat as if being chocked.  I constantly try to keep myself busy to avoid being critical about my time alone - whether it be with friends, food or alcohol.  But occasionally my attention gets divided or I feel sick about ruining my health. 

There are people I want to get closer with because I know it will soothe the pain but they don't make themselves available so it hurts even more.  I need to talk to someone about it but I don't know who - the friends I'm close with have their own situations making it feel condescending to speak about. 

When you've experienced something you thoroughly enjoy - and feels absolutely right - it's hard to live without it afterwards.
😬 uncomfortable  |  ♫ Tyler, The Creator - Nightmare
Link

Cell phone shopping...

May. 18th, 2011   11:12 PM
My contract expires June 19th and I donno what I want to do about it...

I could extend my contract with Telus and get either a Nexus S, Fascinate 4G or Desire HD.  The plans would start at $50/month though.

I could go to Mobiliciy since they have a good promo and plan going on: keep your number, +$100 credit and $35/month unlimited everything.  I'd either go with the Nexus S or HTC Panache. 

Or I could buy an unlocked phone and then stew over deciding which service provider has the best bang for the buck.  Bell has a prepaid plan with unlimited texting for $47.75/month but only 500mbs data.  I'd probably get an unlocked HTC Inspire 4G (eventually Telus will offer it).

I can't decide what I want to do because I've been with Telus for five years and if I leave them I lose my loyalty perks.  But I don't want to be locked into a contract.  Also, I want a phone that stays relevant.  The Nexus S will always have the most up to date software, but all the other phones have better hardware.  I kinda care more about hardware than software .____."  Lastly, Mobilicity is tempting but its network and coverage doesn't compare against Telus/Bell/Rogers ~ plus you can't pop in SIM cards from other providers other than WIND despite their phones being unlocked.

Suggestions?

(MobileSyrup did a good run down of relevant Android phones in Canada)
🌀 drained  |  ♫ Chris Faust (ft. Rocki Evans) - Holli Woode
Link

Bored...

May. 15th, 2011   5:09 PM
It's been a rainy weekend so nothing all that exciting to write about.  My days can be followed through Twitter ~ I didn't want it to affect the frequency of my blogging but that's what's happening.  Kinda care...but kinda don't...any suggestions?

I also need to fix my LJ profile since the Twitter widget is no longer there after trying to tweak the pics o___O.  I've been curious about Tumblr lately so there's a possiblity I might switch sites. 

==========================================

I love comic books, superheroes and cartoons so - naturally - I'm hooked on Young Justice.  Sadly the series is only nine episodes in and the next episode doesn't air until June!  ><**  At least they based Aqualad on a tweaked version of Jackson Hyde ~  so good looking and pretty badass <3.

==========================================

Another week of intense tennis comes to an end at the Rome Masters after a second consecutive finals match between world number one and two, Rafael Nadal and Novak Djokovic.  Incredibly Djokovic won again in straight sets extending his win streak 38-0 and seven trophies this year.  It blows my mind considering his played an intense three hour match less than a day ago! :D

Even though these top players compete as frequently as two or three tournaments a month, each event is almost as important as the last because of the ranking system and race to accumulate points.  I love how it's like that!  The French Open - one of four Grand Slam tournaments - begins in a week.  I am so pumped to watch this! 

==========================================

I just started listening to Tyler, the Creator's new album 'Goblin' even though it's been out for nearly a week.  It follows closely with his first album and I'm really digging it. 

Two days until FAUST drops!  Can't wait!
Chris Faust (ft. Rocki Evans) - As You Like It

'Toronto ABDL/Ageplay Group' Monthly Munch! - May 28th

May. 11th, 2011   10:37 PM

(cross-post)

In and around Toronto there are a lot more ABDLs, ageplayers and babyfurs than you might think!  Wouldn’t it be fun and exciting to hangout with like minded people ~ make some new friends or see familiar ones?  Come join us in a safe and friendly environment over dinner!

 

WHEN:    The munches take place every 3rd Saturday of each month.  However, due to Victoria Weekend it has been postponed to May 28th

TIME:    Munches take place at 7pm until whenever.

WHERE:    The Gov’nor Pub, located at 401 Bloor Street East, just west of Sherbourne subway station.

WEBSITE:   http://www.govnorpub.com/

DIRECTIONS:    The best way to The Gov’nor Pub would be to take the subway to Sherbourne subway station on the Bloor-Danforth line, and walk from there.

If you need public transit information, check out http://www.ttc.ca, http://www.gotransit.ca, or http://www.viarail.ca.

For those who are driving, have a look on Google Maps: Click here!

If you need specific directions from a particular location, please email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com

PARKING:   There is a public parking lot directly behind The Gov’nor Pub (enter off of Selby Street) and costs $6.  The parking ticket machine takes Toonies (Canadian $2 coin) only so be sure to bring three of them along.

HOW TO FIND US:   The munch organizer looks like this ~ short, Asian and wears a spunky hat.  Our table is usually at the back, in the raised level area, near the projector screen. 

The munch organizer will generally be there a few minutes early to request a group of tables be set aside as seating is on a first-come, first-served basis.  That being said, it is important to be at the restaurant as close to 7pm as possible to ensure that the group is seated together.  Those who come later might not be seated at the group table, depending on how busy the restaurant is ~ you might be able to request a table near ours as an alternative.

IMPORTANT NOTE:    This is a *public place* so due discretion is warranted. (i.e. don't come wearing obvious diapers, bondage gear, etc. and don't make a scene. :-)

The munches are NOT a "pickup event" and are NON-SEXUAL in nature. This goes for the munch itself and anywhere the group may go afterwards. It's not a night for "getting some" :-)

CONTACT INFO:   Have more questions? Feel free to email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com

Mother's Day, furmeet, Madrid, music...

May. 8th, 2011   5:30 PM

Happy Mother's Day to all the mothers around the world ~ show your love and appreciation!  You're the best, mom! *hugs*  

I got her some blue hydrangea cause she wanted perennial flowers for the garden.  Took her out to lunch and went to High Park to view the cherry blossoms since they're only around for a week or two. 
     

There was also a person flying an enormously long kite! O3O


===============================================

Thadius's annual bbq furmeet in Niagara Falls the other day was a lot of fun!  Thanks for hosting another memorable spring event, you too Beckaroo!  Also, much kudos to Dodge for getting me there and back ~ you the best! 

It kinda irks me that I didn't know maybe a quarter of the 30 furries there and I didn't make an effort to at least get their names >>"  I kinda feel the same way about last Wednesdays monthly furry munch ~ there was 25 of us and I didn't know maybe 5 of them  *bad dumpling*  Aside from that I had an awesome time!  I got to fursuit with a bunch of others ~ went to a local comic book shop for free arcades, cake and comics, followed by a round of outdoor mini golf at the Great Wolf Lodge.  There weren't as many encounters with families and children as I'd expected, but oh well =P

Photos to be posted when I get'em ~ no real rush! 

===============================================

Watched the Madrid Open today ~ congrats to Novak Djokovic for beating Rafael Nadal 7-5, 6-4.  This was his first time dethrowning the king of clay courts in ten tries since Nadal had 37 unbeaten matches on the surface.  This also extends Djokovic's consecutive winning streak to 32!  Very impressive for such young athletes.  I'm also totally digging the new tournament trophy, the Ion Tiriac Trophy ~ the column can detach from the base!

Kinda bummed that raising Canadian Milos Raonic lost in his second straight opening round match on clay against Frenando Verdasco at the Italian Open.  But the one thing about the tennis circuit is that there are always plenty of chances since tournaments happen every week or two.  So you might be the hot ticket after winning one event but you've got to play consistent in the next ones =P.

===============================================

Fresh Daily's new mixtape "The Quiet Life" is golden.  Download and enjoy! ^-^
This song is on another mixtape but it gives a good feel of what his style is like...

You can now watch the entire segment of the episode preview that I mentioned here ~ props to Riley Kilo for putting it up!

I think it's a very honest examination of one persons ABDL activities.  One shouldn't take it as a full on representation of the entire community though ~ there is great diversity and dynamic.  There isn't any negativity aside from what you choose to ascribe.  It tries to be very supportive and open-minded.  It puts a smile on my face ^-^

Freebies make me squiggly...

May. 1st, 2011   3:21 PM
Another weekend means some more moments of good fun! =3

Saturday was such a nice day out but I burned most of the morning sleeping in followed by an eye doctors appointment.  A year ago I was told I might be at risk for glaucoma because of higher than normal pressure on the nerves.  I go in twice a year for a check up and things don't look like they've changed ~ not good, but at least it hasn't gotten worse.  I got prescribed eye drops which normally would cost a lot, but since the doctor is a family friend I got handed six boxes of samplers! XD

In the afternoon I headed downtown and enjoyed the weather with  , an old friend I met about three years ago at the monthly ABDL/ageplay munches.  We fell out of touch for the longest time but got back into it a couple weeks ago ^^.  Copious amounts of finger food and beer out on the patio at O'Grady's ~ he picked up the tab which made me feel kinda edgy since I'm usually on the giving end and not the recieving.  The feeling got doubly squiggly back at his place when he gave me a free phone since I'd mentioned my contract expires in June.  And then he gave me a bunch of diapers and a Nuk5 pacifier! O____O  So that was waaaaay incredibly generous of him ~ thanks a lot!
  

The phone is an unlocked 'Huawei Ideos' ~ a relatively inexpensive but full featured 2.2 Android smart phone.  It'll be a great phone to get a feel for Android since I've only had my hands on BlackBerry and Apple till now.  The pack of ABU Super Dry Kids is a large, which were too small for him to fit into.  There is no way these are large because I normally wear medium and these fit perfectly!  I'm not too fond of the single tape but they're a total flashy diaper =P.  The retro GoodNites are the thick and white kind - without any design - brought back from Hong Kong.  The pacifier will add to the two I already have, although my favourite one is currently at someone's house ^^;; 

Later at night, with DK's partner, we went to Pegasus for more drinks and to play pool.  They're pretty pro at the game so I got schooled ~ but I learned a lot in the processes.  While heading home a little bit before 1am I bumped into a co-worker on the subway.  He'd been out with his friends watching UFC 129 at a bar ~ local favourite Georges St-Pierre defended his belt but won by decision; winning by serious ass kicking is far more entertaining though. 
🐇 bouncy  |  ♫ Lupe Fiasco (ft. Trey Songz) - Out Of My Head
Link

Videos I've been digging...

Apr. 28th, 2011   9:56 PM
Just a bunch of videos I've watched recently that I like ~ having to do with music, dancing, and a toilet commercial.  I don't wanna spam people's pages so it's under the cut =P

Lil Wayne (ft. Cory Gunz) - 6 Foot 7 Foot
Great lyrics and catchy beat but the video just makes me giggle!  There are as many good visuals as there are funny bad ones ~ I'm impressed by how much is going on scene by scene.  The slow-mo, chick close-ups and black/white scenes are pretty awesome while everything else just looks like someone had too much fun with Photoshop =P


Karmin Cover - Lil Wayne (ft. Cory Gunz) - 6 Foot 7 Foot
Very nice cover ~ the piano adds class, lyrics are spot on even with the changes, and it's impressively one take!


Chris Faust Presents: FAUST (5/17/2011)
I've only been waiting for this album forever!  I absolutely love his Comic Books Unlimited album so I am totally psyched for this.  One of the tracks was released yesterday and it's really chill ~ "Chris Faust (ft. Sunny Jones) - Maybe Now Begins"


World Figure Skating Championship 2011: Patrick Chan short program
I donno nothing about figure skating but it's pretty entertaining and beautiful to watch sometimes.  Canadian Patrick Chan killed the competition with a significant 11 point lead to win gold!  Very impressive and smexy ;)


SYTYCD - Brandon and Kayla Contemporary
Again, I donno anything about dancing but it is so damn incredible to watch!  No movement is wasted, everything expresses something, and it fits so well with the song.  They make it look so easy ~ I can't imagine how strong you need to be to pick up someone without flinching.


Kohler Numi Bidet Toilet
The Bentley of toilets deserves an extremely classy commercial ~ totally dig the music.


🥱 bored  |  ♫ Mother Mother - Angry Sea

Do More Mondays - #28 - "Easter Special"

Apr. 25th, 2011   10:58 PM

Hiya!  I hope everyone had an awesome weekend!  As I mentioned in earlier entries, this week is special because of Easter ~ I went out in fursuit, handed out eggs, made a bunch of people happy, and gave five times as much as I normally do! ^^  I wanted to donate to places people recognized and I love supporting my city so I went with various hospitals and their foundations:

- The Scarborough Hospital Foundation
- Mount Sinai Hospital Foundation
- North York General Hospital Foundation
- SickKids Foundation
- Toronto General & Western Hospital Foundation
           

  

I challenge anyone to do more.

Easter weekend...

Apr. 24th, 2011   11:13 PM
Happy Easter!  Despite relying on the weatherman for inaccurate information, this long weekend has been really great thanks to wonderful friends and doing fun things!

As I mentioned earlier, on Friday I went fursuiting at Edwards Garden to handed out eggs and candy ~ big thanks to   for helping me out! :D  The weather was mostly overcast but a nice variety of couples, young families, cyclists and joggers were around.  At one point my parents passed by unexpectedly ~ it was a bit awkward since I couldn't focus on staying in character despite them knowing about my suit.  Oh well, what's important to me is that fursuiting made a lot of people happy.  The time, money, and energy put into preparing the eggs and donating to charity becomes less important when I know I can brighten someone's day by doing something I simply enjoy ^^.  I'll put up some pictures in tomorrow's DMM.    

(Happy Birthday Dodge!  It was this past Saturday :D)

Later in the evening I made my way to Guelph to visit ,  and .  But thanks to a TTC subway issue I missed my GO Bus by ten minutes; the route comes ever two hours.  After a couple of beers over dinner I took the Greyhound instead ~ it was a pain in the butt since I was lugging around my fursuit >>".  Oh wells, I settled in comfortably when i finally arrived ~ more liquor, fresh padding, and lots of cuddles <3

On Saturday Twicks came over and I got to drive his car around town! >:3  With Stage we walked around downtown ~ it was like only two blocks big!  Guelph is pretty lame even though there's a lot of quaint stores that I find cute.  We went to a really awesome candy store where I got ice cream cause it was felt like summer out :D  Afterwards we browsed through an overpriced toy store cluttered with everything!  I am in love with this picture Twicks took because of the colours...O3O...


When we got back home, we watched 'Between The Lions', a very cubby puppet tv series with a cast of adorable characters ^^.  Come dinner time the three of us picked up Mith from work and ate out ~ I went out in my shortalls and was the only Asian at the restaurant, dysfunctionally representing! 

The rest of Saturday and most of Sunday was spent loafing in front of the tube, being snugglable, and getting chubby eating out...something...something...drowsiness makes for shorter entries...the end.
💤 sleepy  |  ♫ Duck Sauce - Barbra Streisand
Link

This and that...

Apr. 17th, 2011   11:29 PM

What is this...snow in the middle of April?  Back in my days, I'd be play outside in a spring jacket during March Break! >:C

===================================

Did my tax return the other day with UFile again...but I'm kinda nervous whether I did it right or not since I'm getting back just over $800.  It's never been that high before ~ but then again my total income this year is five times as much o___O

===================================

FFFF will be underway soon!  Not phased by other people's opinions ~ just in it for the shits and giggles and I don't get butt hurt over these things =P

===================================

Last night was the monthly ABDL/ageplay munch ~ I really needed it since it's been all furry fun lately and no little time!  I was unsure what the turnout would be since Ms. Seven's littles' playdate in the afternoon got postponed, but a comfortable total of eleven came =3.  It's good to know that I'm not dependant on her attendees, especially since the munch has been going on for years and years. 

Afterwards everyone hung out at Boyricky's place ~ totally had a lot of fun with the building blocks! ^-^  It was probably a bad idea to booze as much as I did cause it certainly hasn't helped my sore throat.  Oh wells, it was good times seeing old and making new friends!  Got shown this clip from an up coming episode of 'Taboo' on the National Geographic Channel ...no negativity just straight up fact, but in general the publicity isn't something we necessarily want >>"

Furry Connection North 2011

Apr. 17th, 2011   2:10 PM
I remember...
- drinking, fursuiting, dancing, room parties ~ repeat multiple times not necessarily in that order
- hot tub and pool a couple of times with Sammy and Evan
- United Nations peeps and a late night Taco Bell run
- dinner at Buca di Bepo
- Odin puncturing a glow stick and jizzing it on my eye by accident
- finally getting a Chilly Mouse toy tag near the end of the con

It's a very short list ~ for most of the con I was either drunk or dehydrated so I don't remember much =P.  With fursuiting and a higher attendance there was a lot more bouncing around than last year, but luckily I got to hang out with everyone I had in mind.  FCN is my favourite con among the one's I've been to so far ~ I love the size, the people, the partying, and the dance ~ so I'll definitely try to go again next year! :D

I don't think I'll be going to anymore cons until later in the year though I might get pressured into doing the Canadian ones.  I have my eyes set on Midwest FurFest in November so I need to save for the time off.  I'm gonna be so jelly next month when people start posting about how much fun they had at ConFuzzled, Morphicon, FA:U and RCFM.

  
                       Fursuit whoring                                                                    ASIANS!
  
I also got three new badges by Neon Slushie and Mary Mouse!

"Layers of dumpling" Meme

Apr. 14th, 2011   10:21 PM

Cause I haven't written anything in a while, here's a meme ~ you should do it too!  At some point I'll make a blip about FCN, till then I'm recovering from a fever and avoiding my taxes. 

===================================

LAYER ONE : THE OUTSIDE
- Name: dumpling
- Eye Color: dark brown
- Colour/Hair Style: black/short and feels like grass when caressed (think Chia Pet)
- Clothing style: jeans with colourful and cartoony tees/hats/shoes/watches
- Best physical feature: short stature ~ I’m fun size! \o.o/

LAYER TWO: THE INSIDE
- Your fears: being forgotten
- Your guilty pleasure: being a tease and flirting for fun ^^;;
- Your biggest pet peeve: being in debt ~ whether financially or owing a favour, big or small
- Your ambitions for the future: move out and be a social hub among my friends ~ I value my privacy and I want to explore my interests with greater freedom

LAYER THREE: THOUGHTS
- Your first thoughts waking up: haven’t slept enough and how much I hate my job
- What you think about most: what other people think about
- What you think about before bed: what will I be looking forward to the next day
- You think your best quality is: adaptable ~ I know how to have fun as much as I know how to listen and comfort

LAYER FOUR: WHAT'S BETTER?
- Single or group dates: I’m not in a relationship but I think group dates would be more fun since it adds variety to the occasion =3
- To be loved or respected: I can’t pick one over the other ~ they seemingly go hand in hand for most situations
- Beauty or brains: brains since beauty can be manufactured
- Dogs or cats: dogs ~ they’re called man’s best friend for a reason

LAYER FIVE: DO YOU?
- Lie: not often, but I can be pretty blunt sometimes which is just as bad as lying :<
- Believe in yourself: when the going gets tough I can motivate myself and bounce out of a funk
- Believe in love: yes ~ in many different forms and expressions
- Want someone: yes but the feelings aren’t mutual

LAYER SIX: EVER?
- Been on stage: yes ~ school bands and symphony orchestra
- Done drugs: yes ~ I’m okay with recreational use but I’m against substance abuse
- Changed who you were to fit in: tried to but didn’t work ~ I’m quite comfortable being myself now ^-^

LAYER SEVEN: FAVORITES
- Favourite color: blue
- Favourite animal: bunnies
- Favourite movie: Lost in Translation
- Favourite game: Might & Magic: Clash of Heroes

LAYER EIGHT: AGE
- Day your next birthday will be: September 28
- How old will you be: 24
- Age you lost your virginity: 22
- Does age matter: nope

LAYER NINE: IN A BOY OR GIRL
- Best personality: decisiveness
- Best eye color: no preference
- Best hair color: no preference
- Best thing to do with a partner: naked cooking ~ best of both worlds! O3O

LAYER TEN: FINISH THE SENTENCE
- I love: the feeling of diapers ^///^
- I feel: restless
- I hide: my belly by sucking it in .___.”
- I miss: being a carefree and curious little kid
- I wish: I could do more and decrease world suck

LAYER ELEVEN: I TAG
Just do it! :V

'Toronto ABDL/Ageplay Group' Monthly Munch! - April 16th

Apr. 3rd, 2011   10:48 PM

(cross-post)

In and around Toronto there are a lot more ABDLs, ageplayers and babyfurs than you might think!  Wouldn’t it be fun and exciting to hangout with like minded people ~ make some new friends or see familiar ones?  Come join us in a safe and friendly environment over dinner!

 

WHEN:    The munches take place every 3rd Saturday of each month. The next munch date is: April 16th

TIME:    Munches take place at 7pm until whenever.

WHERE:    The Gov’nor Pub, located at 401 Bloor Street East, just west of Sherbourne subway station.

WEBSITE:   http://www.govnorpub.com/

DIRECTIONS:    The best way to The Gov’nor Pub would be to take the subway to Sherbourne subway station on the Bloor-Danforth line, and walk from there.

If you need public transit information, check out http://www.ttc.ca, http://www.gotransit.ca, or http://www.viarail.ca.

For those who are driving, have a look on Google Maps: Click here!

If you need specific directions from a particular location, please email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com

PARKING:   There is a public parking lot directly behind The Gov’nor Pub (enter off of Selby Street) and costs $6.  The parking ticket machine takes Toonies (Canadian $2 coin) only so be sure to bring three of them along.

HOW TO FIND US:   The munch organizer looks like this ~ short, Asian and wears a spunky hat.  Our table is usually at the back, in the raised level area, near the projector screen. 

The munch organizer will generally be there a few minutes early to request a group of tables be set aside as seating is on a first-come, first-served basis.  That being said, it is important to be at the restaurant as close to 7pm as possible to ensure that the group is seated together.  Those who come later might not be seated at the group table, depending on how busy the restaurant is ~ you might be able to request a table near ours as an alternative.

IMPORTANT NOTE:    This is a *public place* so due discretion is warranted. (i.e. don't come wearing obvious diapers, bondage gear, etc. and don't make a scene. :-)

The munches are NOT a "pickup event" and are NON-SEXUAL in nature. This goes for the munch itself and anywhere the group may go afterwards. It's not a night for "getting some" :-)

CONTACT INFO:   Have more questions? Feel free to email me: discourse-dumpling@hotmail.com

See you there!

 

~dumpling

😄 cheerful  |  ♫ Outasight - Something To Talk About
Link

Fursuit madness!

Apr. 2nd, 2011   10:54 PM
Fursuiting around downtown today was such an increcible experience! :D  I am simply exhausted and dehydrated from being in suit for 7 hours, but making a lot of people smile was totally worth it.  There were so many photo opts, high-fives, hugs, and little kids to entertain!  With myself included there was 8 fursuiters and 11 spotters ~ kudos to all of them for adding to such a fun time! \o.o/  And special thanks to Dodge for driving me downtown and back! *hugs* 

Maybe I'll write more about it when I've rested up heh.  Oh, and I lied in my last entry, I went full suit instead of partial =P

Props to Richard K Niner for taking and putting up the videos so soon!

Making some money at a Kijiji booth by the Skydome!  I managed to grab $2.87 haha

Dancing to some store music with the others along Queen St. West ^-^

Now I'm just super paranoid because threw my suit into the washing machine for the first time ever.  It's set to delicate (which is 36min ~ way longer than I'd like it to take), detergent is bleach/alcohol free, and the suit is flipped inside out.  I noticed some dirt on the white fur of the leg cuffs so I'm really hoping it comes out!

April: Things to look forward to...

Apr. 1st, 2011   11:15 PM

It's finally the weekend! \o.o/  I couldn't be more happy because this work week has been murder on my body ~ my calves have been shot since Tuesday and each step has just been pain.  I'm pretty sure I've taken more Tylenol this week than I did all last year =.=**  Anywhoo, a lot to look forward to this month! ^-^  Plenty of fursuit action...

Tomorrow I'm gonna be fursuiting around town with a bunch of peeps ~ most likely in partial suit though.  As much as it's way more fun to go out in full, I feel that there's more against it than for.  The fact that there isn't any planned sense of direction with where we'd be going and the lack of convenient space to change in and out of makes me uncomfortable.  Plus, I'm just lazy and don't feel like washing/drying my suit at home afterwards.  I've never gone partial with Clouwy so it'll be interesting =3  I'm bringing some 1 LOVE T.O. t-shirts for Cheeto, Red Velvet and myself ~ I wanna try to get us on their webpage!

Next weekend is Furry Connection North!  I had a blast last year and I know this year will be even crazier ~ boozing, suiting, hookahing, and partying!  I'm gonna be way tired though cause I'm leaving early Friday and getting home late Sunday.  That and I'll also probably be broke haha ~ I've already pre-ordered three badges!

The third Friday of this month is the end of FFFF nominations.  I'm totally gonna get in on this since some rules have been changed from previous years.  I'm hoping to get a video clip of my suit at FCN, but I'm not too competitive with this since it's all in good fun =3.

Easter weekend I wanna fursuit at a park and make people happy! \o.o/  I wanna do something special involving Do More Mondays, where I'd give out eggs stuffed with candy and a paper slip.  The slip would say something like: "You found an Easter Egg!  For that I'll donate $2 to so-and-so charity."  I'm pretty content with, say, fifty bucks between twenty-five eggs among five different charities.

Being and knowing...

Mar. 22nd, 2011   11:12 PM
When I was younger I was a nobody trying to fit in.  It didn't work and it made me unhappy because I wasn't being true to myself.  Luckily I know who I am now and I'm okay with expressing it even if I don't fit in. 

I use to think that in order to be someone important - without having to do something important - I would need to know important people, or at least those who are in a reputable position.  But it's not about who you know or who knows you; it's what you know that's important. 

I'd like to think that I know a handful of people who hold influence over an area or interest.  But when I take a step back and look at it, they are just people too who also want to fit in.  There is no pedestal when time is put into getting to know them.

Since last week I've been chatting with ZEN and getting to know him better.  We were sharing daydreams today and it left a pleasent image in my head ~ it made me feel mellow and refreshed beyond words can describe.  I know who I am and I'm okay with expressing it because it's what you know that's important.  
😎 relaxed  |  ♫ Classified - High Maintenance
Link

FE2011: Thoughts and Happenings...

Mar. 20th, 2011   11:23 PM
I'm experiencing a major decline in blogging this month.  Despite the liberating feeling of sorting my thoughts into words, getting into the mood to type has been tricky.  I've progressively felt more comfortable just talking about the things on my mind with friends (in person) rather than writing about it ~ there's something very raw and unedited about it that brings a new level of contentment. 

==========================================

Anyways...I don't want to write a con report for Furnal Equinox 2011 ~ racking my brain trying to remember everything is too much work.  I had a good time and met a bunch of people I've already forgotten.  There were some stresses and complications, but when I think about it, I just ask "why did I let myself do that?"  I learned a lot about myself which is something different to take away from a con.  Here are some bullet point thoughts and happenings ~ no names even though there are many people I wish to thank and call out...

  • When given two options and unsure of the consequences they might have, take the safer route...the other could have led to death .___.
  • Envy is stupid, especially towards someone who'd never diss me intentionally
  • I know enough people to be able to bounce between various groups of friends ~ don't slow me down, try to keep up!
  • Sticking to one group of friends for a long period can be tough ~ I'll bail and have fun the way I like it next time
  • Introducing friends to friends and not getting to hang out with them exclusively because of that kinda sucks...
  • Not being able to hang out with everyone inclusively also sucks
  • I don't value money like most people; it's just a number to me.  Time and energy is more precious
  • When I have an ideal plan that I know I can execute, don't hold me back or get in my way ~ encourage and help me
  • Much like other situations, one can be in a convention filled with people but still feel lonely
  • Playing music in a crowded room is pointless; it's best enjoyed in small numbers or alone
  • Keep your shoes on, especially in a crowded room with poor air circulation o___O
  • Excuse my gayness, it was pretty flamming and full of tease ^^;;
  • I'll say things I don't mean when I'm tired or cranky ~ my apologizes
  • Cockblock by two people who just wouldn't get the drift =.=**
  • Spent more money for others than on myself ~ didn't buy anything from the con :<
  • I have a heightened respect for fursuiters and how they can affect the lives of non-furries, especially children
  • Brushing and cleaning my fursuit is very relaxing, but not when doing it in the Headless Lounge where the fans can blow out your hearing
  • I'd like to be more animated while in suit ~ add jumping around to the repertoire...and possibly kissing the floor
  • Thank you to those who shared their food and liquor with me ~ I wouldn't have survived without the latter
I didn't have my camera on hand for most of the con so I whored up other peoples...here are some of my favourites...the rest can be viewed in the galleries of my FA...

                             
🙂 okay  |  ♫ Ratatat - Breaking Away
Link

Having fun is exhausting!

Mar. 15th, 2011   8:31 PM
Phew!  I finally have a moment to settle down and browse the web ~ haven't been on my computer since Friday morning! o.o  I'm way tired from getting home late the past two nights and then waking early for work, but I'm feeling really good right now =3.

I had a lot of fun at Furnal Equinox year despite some stresses and complications.  There's always so many people I want to see and have fun with that missing out on opportunities really bums me out.  The babyfur room and events I hosted were successful but whether I'd commit to doing it again next year really depends on my con goals and expectations.  The highlight of my weekend would definitely be fursuiting on Sunday ~ I got to cheer up a little girl who was in tears as well as bounce around with Zen and then hang out in the Headless Lounge!  I'll consider writing a more thorough report when I've collected my thoughts =P. 


(Pic taken by Hypr of Clouwy (me) and Joshua Tiger (Zen))

I know post-con depression won't phase me because I'm gonna let the good times keep coming!  Yesterday after work I hung out at Boyricky and Daddy's place with Cameron and the owner of PacifiersRus ~ who was visiting from Texas.  A lot of good laughs, some interesting discussions, and of course comfy diapers.  We had spaghetti for dinner which would've been a messy ordeal but luckily daddy made sure we had bibs on.  Plus, what's better than root beer floats for dessert?!? :D  The night was exactly what I needed after such a roller coaster con ~ just pure relaxation and letting myself be me. 

St. Patrick's Day is this Thursday.  The littles' play date and ageplay munch is on Saturday.  Good times ^-^.
😴 tired  |  ♫ Outasight - Another L@te Night
